title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Landmark Books

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Landmark Books
jsonLd.description:
Landmark Books is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Landmark Books:
Landmark Books is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Books!
